name: Onion & Mushroom Bhajis
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, quarter and thinly slice onion.
2. Coarsely chop mushrooms.
3. In a bowl, combine flours, turmeric, chili powder, cumin, coriander, and salt.
4. Stir in onion, mushrooms, and yogurt; mix well.
5. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C) or until a 1/2-inch cube of day-old bread browns in 40 seconds.
6. Divide mixture into 10 equal portions.
7. Drop spoonfuls of mixture into hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Garnish with parsley sprig if desired, and serve warm.
